title: Mowladah #4137
definition:
Moladah = "birth" or "race"

 1) a town in the south of Canaan allocated to Judah then reallocated
    to Simeon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Moladah = "birth" or "race"

 1) a town in the south of Canaan allocated to Judah then reallocated
    to Simeon

    NASB:  a city in Simeon
